articles.title: Malaysia’s LGBTQ groups tread more carefully amid recent enforcement, ministers’ rhetoric
articles.content: These and other moves in recent months by Malaysian authorities have raised questions among the community about whether enforcement against LGBTQ-related activities is being stepped up. On May 25, 51 men were arrested in four separate...
